inputs.label: Weight in Hundredweight
inputs.businessContext: Enter the weight in hundredweight to convert to pounds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the weight in hundredweight to convert to pounds.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pound'a dönüştürmek için hundredweight cinsinden ağırlığı girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie das Gewicht in Zentner ein, um in Pfund umzurechnen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrez le poids en quintal pour le convertir en livres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingrese el peso en quintales para convertir a libras.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Pounds per hundredweight. Default 100 for short hundredweight; use 112 for long hundredweight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Pounds per hundredweight. Default 100 for short hundredweight; use 112 for long hundredweight.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hundredweight başına pound. Kısa hundredweight için varsayılan 100; uzun hundredweight için 112 kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Pfund pro Zentner. Standard 100 für kurzen Zentner; verwenden Sie 112 für langen Zentner.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Livres par quintal. Par défaut 100 pour le quintal court ; utiliser 112 pour le quintal long.
businessContext_i18n.es: Libras por quintal. Valor predeterminado 100 para quintal corto; use 112 para quintal largo.

inputs.label: Number of Items
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical items. Use 1 if converting a single weight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical items. Use 1 if converting a single weight.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aynı öğelerin sayısı. Tek bir ağırlık dönüştürülüyorsa 1 kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl identischer Artikel. Verwenden Sie 1, wenn Sie ein einzelnes Gewicht umrechnen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'articles identiques. Utilisez 1 pour convertir un seul poids.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de artículos idénticos. Use 1 si convierte un solo peso.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgabe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para la salida.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
